infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ThanaFit uses the microphone to log food and exercise by voice.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: ThanaFit uses speech recognition to turn your voice into text when you log food and exercise by voice.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ThanaFit may access your photo library so you can attach photos to your entries, if you choose.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: ThanaFit uses Apple HealthKit to read your step count and sleep data to power cycle insights, reminders, and progress trends.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: ThanaFit does not write Health data to Apple Health.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: ThanaFit uses Apple HealthKit to read your step count and sleep data to power cycle insights, reminders, and progress trends.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: ThanaFit does not write Health data to Apple Health.
